进入不同影视世界，体验百样人生。
弥补意难平，暴揍骚浪贱。
有热血，有冒险，也有温暖日常。
无固定女主，后宫有度。
不脑残、不狗血，智商在线。
杀伐果断，快意恩仇。
让我们陪伴主角一路逆袭，登顶诸天万界强者之巅。
目前世界:泰坦尼克号，僵尸世界大战，金陵十三钗，峡谷，倚天世界，后天，古惑仔之人在江湖，钢铁侠，神话，异形大战铁血战士，变形金刚，长城，死神来了，海贼王，僵尸先生，金刚骷髅岛，倩女幽魂，2012，修仙世界，漫威1，黑夜传说，环太平洋，终结者，生化危机，林中小屋，情满四合院，X战警，流浪地球，正义联盟，银河护卫队。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2d38af45eecf27ea7e904c542ccbdb3b","author":"流觞无声","author_id":"","book_id":"7553643820361993241","book_name":"我在诸天影视世界薅羊毛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7553643947222893081","read_count":"14945","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"622991"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"292","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,诸天万界,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d702da768097dbacee2ee0636232fb73~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297482&x-signature=xtQWI49FVWQ5fSerI8VtsxmeFSE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"24647227410506","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032201180215C13D47B1E635B85D61"}"},"relate_info_
